tools.name: send_email
tools.description: Send an email via Resend. Use this tool to deliver reports, summaries, or notifications to one or more recipients. Required params: to (string), subject (string), html (string, HTML email body).

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Search the web via Tavily and return structured results. Use this tool to research current facts, news, prices, or any information not in training data. Required params: query (string).

tools.name: google_drive
tools.description: Read, write, list, and search files in Google Drive. Use read to get file contents, write to create or update a file, list to see files in a folder, search to find files by name or content.

folder_id.description: Folder ID to list or write into (optional)

mime_type.description: MIME type for write, default text/plain
